appraisal_events.evidence: « Sa figure fruste, réduite, atrocement expressive… la figure rude, violâtre, rousse, désespérée de quelque sauvage gardienne de tombeau… Ensuite, il faudrait la briser… descendre. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narration insists on the physical alteration and the funereal imagination of the grandmother, presenting her as a primitive statue ready to be 'broken', signaling an extreme decline and the approach of death.

status_effects.explanation: She is locally diminished by the portrait of an altered, mineralized figure promised to the tomb.
